testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //div[contains(normalize-space(),'Pickup Date')]/..//div[normalize-space()='25 Apr' and not(contains(@class,'disabled'))] (tried for 40 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.5' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\sansa\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:49879}, goog:processID: 30824, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:49879/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: ddd452724f38ac63652f1251f952202b

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //div[contains(normalize-space(),'Pickup Date')]/..//div[normalize-space()='25 Apr' and not(contains(@class,'disabled'))] (tried for 40 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.5' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\sansa\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:49879}, goog:processID: 30824, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:49879/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: ddd452724f38ac63652f1251f952202b at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at com.nobroker.sprint.pages.AddInventoryPage.ConfirmDate(AddInventoryPage.java:401) at com.nobroker.sprint.stepdefinitions.PackageAndMover.system_should_guide_user_based_on_availability_for_date(PackageAndMover.java:162) at ✽.System should guide the user to the next step based on availability for date "25 Apr"(file:///C:/Users/sansa/git/Capgemini-Nobroker-Sprint-Team02/src/test/java/com/nobroker/sprint/features/PackageAndMover.feature:15)
